item.title: Is 'Tech-xit' Imminent? UK Steps Up Sovereignty Push Amid AI Strife
item.description: The US government's restrictions on Anthropic and OpenAI frontier models have intensified calls in the UK and other countries to reduce their reliance on US tech companies, with significant cyber implications.

item.title: Expanding AI Control from Models to Harnesses

Yet in 2026, usage o

item.title: RT by @Dinosn: A single prompt got an AI to hand over S3 bucket contents, and Amazon Bedrock's content moderation never flagged it. We broke down the full exploit chain, the sanitized PoC, and the fix
item.description: pA single prompt got an AI to hand over S3 bucket contents, and Amazon Bedrock's content moderation never flagged it. We broke down the full exploit chain, the sanitized PoC, and the fixes in this week's Exploits Explained: a href="https://hubs.ly/Q04pFqJS0"hubs.ly/Q04pFqJS0/abr /br /a href="https:/

item.title: Claude Flaw Automatically Sends Malicious Prompts to AI Agents
item.description: When combined with another exploit, the &quot;PromptFiction&quot; vulnerability, which has been fixed, could have enabled an end-to-end attack on a targeted system.

item.title: We scaled a robot model natively to 8,000 timesteps of context, 5 minutes worth of muscle memory, with constant inference cost. Robot policies used to live their lives a few frames at a time ( 0.1 sec
item.description: pWe scaled a robot model natively to 8,000 timesteps of context, 5 minutes worth of muscle memory, with constant inference cost. Robot policies used to live their lives a few frames at a time (&lt; 0.1 sec), instantly forgetting what just happened. We pushed to 3 orders of magnitude beyond SOTA. br

item.title: Calling all open-source robotics builders! 🤖 Our friends at AMD just launched a hackathon with Physical AI track. Time to fire up LeRobot and build cool projects! 🤗🚀👇
item.description: pCalling all open-source robotics builders! 🤖 Our friends at AMD just launched a hackathon with Physical AI track. item.title: Note the current expectations are still around test time compute/more tokens for a given task This is not the case Tokens per task will now drop even as quality improves Cost per intelligence equivale
item.description: pNote the current expectations are still around test time compute/more tokens for a given taskbr /br /This is not the casebr /br /Tokens per task will now drop even as quality improvesbr /br /Cost per intelligence equivalent token will drop 100xbr /br /Jevon's paradox does not apply here/phr /blockq

item.title: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
item.description: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.

item.title: Intresting challenge! A developer Eric Lu has developed "Ghost Font", a font he claims can be read only by humans and not by leading Al models. He said neither Anthropic's nor OpenAl's most powerful m
item.description: pIntresting challenge!br /br /A developer Eric Lu has developed "Ghost Font", a font he claims can be read only by humans and not by leading Al models.br /br /He said neither Anthropic's nor OpenAl's most powerful models could decipher the font correctly. br /br /The font uses a combination of motio

item.description: pBNB Chain Completes 36th Quarterly Burn, Removing 1.61M BNBbr /br /According to an official announcement, BNB Chain has completed its 36th quarterly BNB token burn, destroying 1,615,827.795 BNB worth approximately $932 million at the time of the burn. Following the burn, BNB’s total supply stands a

item.title: reminder Quantum computing just took a meaningful step into real-world biology. "Danish scientists combined a photonic quantum computer with generative AI to design vaccine peptides, then validated th
item.description: preminderbr /br /Quantum computing just took a meaningful step into real-world biology.br /br /"Danish scientists combined a photonic quantum computer with generative AI to design vaccine peptides, then validated the results in the lab."br /br /"Across 131 HLA types, the hybrid system generated stro

item.title: RT by @nono2357: Vous voulez faire tourner un modèle 70B+ sans GPU 80 Go ? Mesh LLM, open source, en Rust, distribue l'inférence sur vos machines : un nœud suffit si le modèle tient, sinon il route ve
item.description: pVous voulez faire tourner un modèle 70B+ sans GPU 80 Go ? Mesh LLM, open source, en Rust, distribue l'inférence sur vos machines : un nœud suffit si le modèle tient, sinon il route vers un pair, sinon il shard par couches. ⬇️/pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHNQq5vjWYAA2vNE.jpg" /

item.title: GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
item.description: Explore GPT-Red, OpenAI’s automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness.

item.title: RT by @Dinosn: We built a 1,007-task benchmark to see how secure LLM-generated code is by default. Across eleven models and ten languages, every one wrote exploitable code 25 to 37% of the time. The g
item.description: pWe built a 1,007-task benchmark to see how secure LLM-generated code is by default. Across eleven models and ten languages, every one wrote exploitable code 25 to 37% of the time.br /br /The good news: ask an LLM for secure code and it usually writes it. br /br /The bad news: real prompts descri

item.title: What we liked building this with http://LI.FI's team: they didn't want a risk score to interpret. They wanted one clear answer, approve or deny, that integrators could act on without translating anyth
item.description: pWhat we liked building this with a href="http://LI.FI"LI.FI/a's team: they didn't want a risk score to interpret. They wanted one clear answer, approve or deny, that integrators could act on without translating anything.br /br /That's the call Token Screening returns on every token in their databas

item.title: AI will jeed $5 TRILLION every year by 2040. SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son predicts AI will require $5 trillion in annual investment by 2040. He believes AI could generate 20% of global GDP by then. A
item.description: pAI will jeed $5 TRILLION every year by 2040.br /br /&gt; SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son predicts AI will require $5 trillion in annual investment by 2040. br /&gt; He believes AI could generate 20% of global GDP by then. br /&gt; AI data centers may need 3 terawatts of power, about 1.8× today's global

item.title: Pumpfun Completes First Team and Investor Token Unlock Worth $86.49 Million PUMP According to @EmberCN, Pumpfun's one-year lock-up for team and investor tokens expired today, marking the start of a th
item.description: pPumpfun Completes First Team and Investor Token Unlock Worth $86.49 Million PUMPbr /br /According to a href="https://nitter.net/EmberCN" title="余烬"@EmberCN/a, Pumpfun's one-year lock-up for team and investor tokens expired today, marking the start of a three-year vesting period. Earlier today, Pump
